name: io.github.kassol/mcp-searxng
title: SearXNG Search
description: MCP server for SearXNG — privacy-respecting web search with pagination, URL reading

environmentVariables.name: USER_AGENT
environmentVariables.description: Global User-Agent header for outgoing requests

environmentVariables.name: SEARXNG_HEADERS
environmentVariables.description: Extra JSON headers for SearXNG search requests

environmentVariables.name: SEARXNG_HEADERS_BASE64
environmentVariables.description: Base64-encoded JSON headers for SearXNG search requests

environmentVariables.name: URL_READER_HEADERS
environmentVariables.description: Extra JSON headers for URL read requests

environmentVariables.name: URL_READER_HEADERS_BASE64
environmentVariables.description: Base64-encoded JSON headers for URL read requests
